text: This document outlines the Scope of Work (SOW) for the Countertops for the GSC Birchway Commerce City multifamily project. This SOW is an Exhibit "A" to the Subcontract between GS Construction Mountain, LLC and GOLDEN STONES LP, dated December 5 , 2025. All capitalized terms used but not defined herein have the meaning ascribed to them in the Subcontract or General Conditions, as applicable.
